name: Super Memory
description: Local multi-layer main memory for OpenClaw multi-agents

registerExclusiveMemoryCapability.description: Development-only guard. Keep false unless explicitly testing Super Memory as the active OpenClaw memory slot.

registerLegacyMemoryShims.description: Development-only guard. Register memory_search/memory_get compatibility shims only when Super Memory is the exclusive memory slot.

registerDynamicMcpToolProxy.description: Development-only guard. Register a dynamic MCP tools/list proxy tool for sandbox backtests.

registerSuperMemoryHooks.description: Development-only guard. Register experimental OpenClaw hook skeletons only after live hook API validation.

prePromptLimit.description: Maximum context records requested by the experimental pre-prompt hook skeleton.

toolProfile.description: Declared Super Memory tool exposure profile hint for docs/tests; static OpenClaw tools are registered synchronously.
